data.name: MoveFilesToS3.Help
data.value: When enable this option, all files uploaded to UVG will be finally moved to Amazon S3, please be aware Amazon S3 charges you on this service, for further information please refer to Amazon S3.

data.name: plAccessKeyId.Help
data.value: Obtain your access key id and secret access key on "AWS Access Identifiers" page after registering Simple Storage Service on Amazon

data.name: plSecretAccessKey.Help
data.value: Obtain your access key id and secret access key on "AWS Access Identifiers" page after registering Simple Storage Service on Amazon

data.name: NeedBucket.Text
data.value: Please select a bucket to store your files.

data.name: plBucket.Help
data.value: Select a bucket to store your files, Every file stored in Amazon S3 is contained in a bucket. Buckets partition the namespace of objects stored in Amazon S3 at the top level. please note bucket names must be unique across all of Amazon S3

data.name: plAddBucket.Help
data.value: Add a new bucket, you will get a "409 Conflict" error if the bucket name is already used by other peopels.

data.name: CloudFront.Text
data.value: Cloud Front, leave it blank to disable it

data.name: plDistributionName.Help
data.value: The distribution name you created in Amazon CloudFront console

data.name: plDistributionType.Help
data.value: The delivery method of this distribution, Amazon requires you to choose it before creating any distribution

data.name: SchedulerInstalled.Text
data.value:
The scheduler to upload local videos to amazon s3 server is already installed.

To change its frequency, search for "AWSOperationScheduler" in Host - Schedule and alter it by your self.

data.name: SchedulerNotInstalled.Text
data.value: The scheduler to upload local videos to amazon s3 server is not installed, click Finish button to install it.

data.name: plShortUrl.Help
data.value: Choose this option to exclude $portal root/UltraVideoGallery/ from video url when transfer to Amazone S3

data.name: AutoEncodeS3Videos.Help
data.value: When enabled, you can manually upload videos to /ToBeEncoded folder(case sensitive) of your chosen Amazon S3 bucket, UVG will automatically encode them and add to UVG

data.name: EnableElasticTranscoder.Help
data.value: When enabled, UVG will not encode videos by itself, intead it uploads all videos to Amazon, and Amazon Elastic Transcoder service will encode these videos and charges you based on the length of your videos.

data.name: LowQualityVersion.Help
data.value: The video format of the low quality version, Generic 480p is recommended.

data.name: HighQualityVersion.Help
data.value: The video format of the high quality version.

data.name: ServerRegion.Help
data.value: The geographical region where Amazon S3 will store the buckets you create. You might choose a region to optimize latency, minimize costs, or address regulatory requirements. For example, if you reside in Europe, you will probably find it advantageous to create buckets in the EU (Ireland) Region.
